description: An external auditor requests all invoices over $50,000 from the previous fiscal year.

nodes.task_description: Query the accounting system for all vendor invoices meeting the specified criteria (>$50k, last fiscal year).

expected_outcome.value: Agent runs the query and gets a list of 25 matching invoices.

nodes.task_description: Compile the invoice documents into a single, secure package.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gathers all 25 invoice PDFs into a zip file.

nodes.task_description: Provide the secure package to the auditor via the approved secure portal.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully uploads the document package to the audit portal.
